plugin.description: Plugin core — packaging, config, distribution, versioning

children.hooks: Claude Code hooks (SessionStart, PreToolUse, Stop, UserPrompt)
children.boot: Session startup and boot briefing logic

bin.description: CLI scripts — commit, log, install, doctor, repair, upgrade, bootstrap, gc

children.install: git-memory-install.py — plugin installation into target projects
children.lifecycle: doctor, repair, upgrade, uninstall, gc scripts

lib.description: Shared Python library — parsing, constants, git helpers, colors, version

tests.description: Pytest test suite — integration, boot, lifecycle, drift, bootstrap

extension.description: VS Code extension — ideas, mockups, UI explorations

notes: Claude Code plugin (Python, v3.6.0) that adds persistent memory to Claude via git commit trailers. Top-level scope 'plugin' is overloaded in history — many commits use plugin/* for hooks, skills, agents, boot. The 'bin' scope is new but maps to the scripts directory which has no dedicated scope in history. Several historic scopes (api, forms, dashboard, cli, db) appear from target-project commits, not from this plugin's own code — they are omitted from the scope map. Extension is a future VS Code companion in early design phase.
